seoTitle: Townview vs Trebonne — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Townview and Trebonne. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Townview and Trebonne.
heading: Townview vs Trebonne — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Townview, Queensland and Trebonne, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Townview has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Trebonne (31/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Townview or Trebonne safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Townview has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Trebonne scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Townview scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Trebonne scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Townview or Trebonne?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Townview has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.08% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
